details.text: This expansion has no parameters; in the absence of the parameters that controlled the expansion, systems may not be unable to determine whether it is safe to use this expansion
This expansion has no identifier. Identifiers are recommended to help with audit and traceability
Because the expansion uses system 'http://loinc.org' without a version, it should list the system using the expansion parameter 'used-codesystem'
The expansion provided has an extra code 80764-4 that is not in the expansion using default expansion parameters
